Destroyed Metro.description: Dust hangs suspended in the shafts of light. Dark creaks and unsettling noises echo throughout the chamber. Somewhere in the silence, something shifts.

Explore Platform.choice_description: The boarding platform stretches into darkness.

Debug Hub.description: You step outside the story for a moment. There are four test routes that lead directly to an ending

Test Escape Ending.choice_description: Jump straight to the basic escape ending.

Test Supply Escape Ending.choice_description: Jump straight to the supply-loaded vehicle ending.

Test Stay Ending.choice_description: Jump straight to the restore-power ending.

Test Sacrifice Ending.choice_description: Jump straight to the sacrifice ending.

Metro Platform.description: You emerge onto the old boarding platform. Debris litters the concrete, and the tracks vanish into black tunnels on either side. The stillness here feels older than the ruin above.

Search Waiting Area.choice_description: Old bags and benches sit undisturbed nearby.

Side Passage.description: Leaving the open station behind, you slip into a damp side corridor half-hidden by broken tile and hanging cable. Pipes crowd the walls, and every footstep bounces back in a dull metallic echo.

Surface Entrance.description: Climbing the cracked stairwell out of the station, you emerge from the Metro into gray daylight. Wind drags paper and grit across the broken pavement, and the city stretches around you in silence.

Walk the Street.choice_description: Head outward into the open road.

Alleyway.description: You step into a narrow alley hemmed in by stained brick and rusted fire escapes. Trash collects in the corners, and the wind dies here, replaced by the drip of water somewhere deeper in the dark.

Follow Alley Deeper.choice_description: Keep moving between the buildings where the shadows thicken.

Climb Fire Escape.choice_description: Use the rusted metal ladder to reach higher ground and cut toward the city edge.

Waiting Area.description: From the platform, you pass into what used to be the station's waiting area. Benches lie overturned, torn bags are scattered across the floor, and a few personal belongings remain where someone abandoned them in haste.

Follow Noise.choice_description: Metallic sounds carry from a nearby corridor.

Dark Tunnel.description: Whether you came by the tracks or pressed through the side passage, the Metro gives way here to a tunnel so dark it seems to drink the little light left. The air is cooler, heavier, and each step echoes farther than it should.

Maintenance Junction.description: The tunnel opens into a maintenance junction where service passages, piping, and access routes knot together beneath the Metro. The place feels like the buried skeleton of the city.

Follow Machinery.choice_description: A loud hum draws you deeper.

Open Storage Door.choice_description: A rusted service door stands slightly ajar.

Security Corridor.description: Following metallic noise from the waiting area or the faded security signs from the junction brings you into a corridor lined with dead cameras and silent alarm boxes. The walls still carry the faded authority of the old world.

Break Into the Armory.choice_description: Break into the sealed security stores and arm yourself.

Search the Checkpoint.choice_description: Look through the abandoned guard area for another route.

Slip Through Secret Hatch.choice_description: A hidden panel behind debris leads elsewhere.

Armory Cache.description: The sealed stores open with a shriek of warped metal. Inside, battered weapons, riot gear, and cracked ammo cases wait beneath years of dust. Even now, the room feels dangerous.

Arm Yourself and Move On.choice_description: Take what you can carry and press deeper into the security wing.

Take the Maintenance exit.choice_description: Use a narrow service opening at the back of the cache.

Holding Cells.description: Beyond the security rooms, the corridor narrows into a line of reinforced holding cells. Voices echo from behind locked doors—survivors, hungry and terrified, trapped with no way out.

Ignore Them.choice_description: Focus on your own survival and move on.

Storage Room.description: Whether you came by searching abandoned bags, opening the rusted service door, or slipping through the hidden hatch from security, you end up in a dusty storage room packed with untouched crates. For the first time since waking, survival feels tangible.

Search Deep Storage.choice_description: Dig through the crates for useful supplies.

Take the Hidden Tunnel.choice_description: A narrow crawlspace leads out toward the city edge.

Supply Route.description: Moving deeper through storage and adjoining work areas, you uncover preserved food, salvageable tools, intact fuel reserves, and the remnants of an underground garage. It is enough to turn escape into a real plan—if you commit to it.

Prepare the Vehicle.choice_description: Use what you found to repair and fuel a working vehicle.

Leave on Foot.choice_description: Take only what you can carry and move on.

Final Decision On Foot.description: You leave the supply route carrying what you can manage. The city still offers two futures: flee what remains, or gamble on bringing part of it back to life.

Escape Alone.choice_description: Leave now, with whatever you carry.

Restore Power.choice_description: Turn back and try to wake the buried systems below.

Street Outskirts.description: Leaving the Metro behind through the surface entrance, you move toward the outer streets where the city begins to thin. Cracked pavement stretches ahead, and the buildings no longer feel endless.

Move Forward.choice_description: Stay low and keep toward the edge of the city.

Search Buildings.choice_description: Look for another way through the abandoned structures.

Abandoned Offices.description: You slip into a block of empty offices overlooking the dead streets below. Desks, glass, and paper remain frozen in place, as though work simply stopped mid-thought. From here, the city feels vast but readable.

Cross Through the Building.choice_description: Climb higher and cut across the rooftops toward open ground.

Head Back Down.choice_description: Drop back into the city and find another route.

Collapsed Highway.description: You reach the broken highway either by pressing outward from the streets, crossing through the buildings, or crawling through the hidden tunnel from storage. Here the city literally splits apart, opening one path toward freedom and another back into its machinery.

Climb Through.choice_description: Push forward toward the city limits.

Drop Down Hatch.choice_description: A hidden maintenance hatch leads back underground.

Generator Room.description: Whether you followed the machinery from the junction, emerged from the buildings, or dropped down from the highway hatch, you arrive at the same place: the generator room, where the city's buried heart still flickers. The air is warmer here, charged with possibility and danger.

Go to Control.choice_description: Step into the control area and decide what future you want.

Final Decision.description: You stand at the heart of what remains. The city breathes faintly around you, broken, but not silent. The path forward is no longer hidden. What you do now will define what comes next.

Escape Alone.choice_description: Leave now, with whatever you carry.

Restore Power.choice_description: Stay, and try to bring life back to what remains.

Escape Ending.description: You leave the city behind, stepping beyond its broken edge into uncertain ground. Whatever remains inside fades into silence behind you. You survived, but the future is still unwritten.

Supply Escape Ending.description: With supplies secured and the engine running, you drive out of the city with purpose. Whatever waits beyond, you are ready for it.

Stay Ending.description: Power surges through the Metro once more. Lights flicker on in the darkness, and the city stirs faintly around you. You choose to remain. Not to escape, but to rebuild.

Sacrifice Ending.description: You act without hesitation. In the chaos that follows, others find their chance to escape. You remain behind, knowing the cost. Your path ends here but not without meaning.
